source.notes: Jayden only reported issues; unmentioned reviewed structures are treated as visually acceptable for this pass.

summary.primary_issue: Some valid land structures are visually spawning as islands in ocean/lake terrain.
summary.structure_models: Mostly acceptable; reported failures are placement/context problems, not structure design failures.

findings.reported_issue: Dragon roosts are spawning as islands in water like oceans/lakes.
findings.log_evidence: Exact roost locate lines were not present in latest.log; this entry is from Jayden's visual review note.

findings.reported_issue: Abandoned vineyard spawned as an island in water like an ocean/lake.
IDAS overrides the Ice and Fire gorgon temple with idas:labyrinth.
findings.visual_result: Jayden said the IDAS labyrinth looks good.

findings.reported_issue: IDAS overrides the Ice and Fire graveyard with idas:haunted_manor.

log_evidence.message: IDAS overrides this Ice and Fire structure! Use /locate structure idas:haunted_manor instead!

source_only_policy_correction_applied: Structure tiering generator no longer uses source_mod text for biome-family inference.
frost_cold and frozen_ocean are now separate biome families.
Ice and Fire non-siren structures are no longer classified as water/frozen-ocean structures only because the mod name contains Ice.
Dragon roosts, dragon caves, gorgon temple, graveyard, and related Ice and Fire land structures now keep water_role=none unless their actual structure identity is water.
next_review_targets: Re-test dragon roost locations after future live region/biome tag candidates are approved.
Inspect idas:abandoned_vineyard in at least one more locate result to confirm whether this is recurring or one bad terrain edge.
Continue route from the next highest-risk command after graveyard/haunted manor.
